title: Double Dragon Extra Thick Fragile Printed Tape – 48mm wide, 66m long (Pack of 3) | Tear-Resistant, High-Tack & Long-Lasting | Ideal for Packing, Moving, Shipping, Labelling | Fits Dispensers etc
features: ✅ GENEROUS SIZE & VALUE PACK: Each roll measures 48mm in width and 66m in length, providing ample coverage for multiple packing or labeling tasks. Comes in a cost-effective pack of 3 rolls—perfect for bulk use at home, office, or warehouse.

✅ EXTRA STRONG & TEAR-RESISTANT: Made with high tensile strength material and a durable 45-micron thickness, this fragile packing tape resists tearing and splitting during application. It ensures a firm, long-lasting bond to cardboard, plastic, and most surfaces.

✅ HIGHLY VISIBLE & ATTENTION-GRABBING: The bold “FRAGILE” message in vibrant red lettering ensures handlers notice and treat packages with care. Prevents damage by clearly indicating delicate contents.

✅ MULTIPURPOSE & VERSATILE: Ideal for moving, shipping, storage, and labeling. Use it in warehouses, offices, or at home to seal boxes, pack delicate items, or organize inventory. Sticks firmly and remains intact even in long-haul storage.

✅ TRUSTED QUALITY FROM DOUBLE DRAGON: Double Dragon is known for durable, high-performance packaging solutions. This fragile tape upholds that standard—ensuring peace of mind when protecting your valuables.
